### SWE Bench / Seaborn 2848 Guardrails
*~12,980 tokens/session saved*
- In `mwaskom__seaborn-2848`, avoid repeated `cd ... && pytest/python/git diff` shell loops; set `cwd` to the bench repo once and run the targeted command directly.
